description_long: This object is a classic Pentax MG film camera, featuring a robust rectangular body with a textured black grip and metallic silver top and bottom plates. The front displays a prominent interchangeable lens with a black lens cap labeled 'PENTAX', and a visible focus ring with engraved markings. The top of the camera includes a film advance lever, shutter button, and a mode dial, all rendered in black and silver. The back of the camera is dominated by a textured black panel and a small viewfinder window, with minimal controls visible. Both sides of the camera have metal strap lugs for attaching a carrying strap, and the right side features a film rewind knob. The overall design is utilitarian and compact, typical of vintage 35mm SLR cameras, with clear branding and functional details.
description: A vintage Pentax MG film camera with a black textured grip, silver metallic body, and a prominent interchangeable lens with a branded lens cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pentax branding, lens with cap, and top controls including the film advance lever and shutter button.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the lens barrel, focus ring, and the film rewind knob on the top left corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the textured back panel, viewfinder window, and minimal rear controls.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the lens profile, grip texture, and the film advance lever on the top right.
